intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How to Choose the Right Social Platform. Choose based on where your audience already spends time, the content formats you can produce, and your business goal. Avoid starting everywhere at once.
mainSummary: Choose based on where your audience already spends time, the content formats you can produce, and your business goal. Avoid starting everywhere at once.
